other_observers: Mark Peterson, Bill Maynard, Brad Steger, Duane Nelson, Cole Wild, and others.; no, found by Connie Kolger the day before.
description: An orange oriole, with big bill, black under the bill, brighter orange below the eyes, near the black under the bill. Duller orange head. Grayish/green back with streaking. Grayish wings with white wing bars. Yellowish tail. Yellowish underparts.Behaviors: Seen in pine tree and at feeder from inside Connie Kogler's kitchen window.Call: nonePlumage: adult
